name: Performance Engineers Analysis Pack
description: Provides bottleneck analysis and document summarization for performance engineers. Turns raw load test output into prioritised, actionable findings.
author: ai-skills-maintainer

delivery_modes.instructions: After a load test run, paste the summary results into Copilot Chat with the skill definition as the system prompt.
Integrate with your load test runner (k6, Locust, JMeter) to automatically POST results to this endpoint after each run.
Expose as an MCP tool for integration with CI/CD pipelines.
Deploy as a Copilot Studio skill accessible from the performance engineering Teams channel.
Deploy via internal API layer for environments where performance data is confidential.

configuration.additional_notes: Consistent low-temperature settings produce reproducible analysis reports across test runs.

changelog.notes: Initial package with bottleneck analysis skill and shared utility skills.
